title: T3 Ingestion: Distill knowledge-capture — eval gap-fill + winner verification (201-artifact cluster)
prompt: Bring the knowledge-capture cluster (largest in the 1,100-artifact corpus) to evidence-backed, review-ready state. IMPORTANT premise correction from authoring recon: the cluster is NOT undistilled — 7 draft distillation files already exist at research/distillations/knowledge-capture-*.md (2026-05-18, status: draft). What is missing is the evaluation layer the catalog procedure requires: ~92 of the 111 source artifacts those distillations cite have no eval file, and 4 of the 7 winner-mechanism picks were never scored. Do: build a resolved worklist (distillation source_artifacts fuzzy-matched to research/artifacts.jsonl corpus ids), fan out 7 in-session subagent batches writing per-artifact evaluation files to research/evaluations/ (new files only, existing evals untouched), QC the output, then append a dated 'Winner verification' section to each of the 7 distillations (CONFIRMED/CONTESTED/UNVERIFIABLE — never edit frontmatter or flip winner_mechanism; contested winners are David's call), append status blocks to research/distillations/INDEX.md and research/INDEX.md, stage 3 chained ingestion-ticket PROPOSALS (learning-instinct-promotion, multi-source-researcher, adr-documentation — the YES gap-closers) under backlog/wargames/proof/T3-06/next-tickets/ WITHOUT queueing them, write backlog/wargames/proof/T3-06/REPORT.md (including the stale-premise finding, which also applies to sibling tickets T3-07..T3-12), and commit. Never touch upstream repos, artifacts.jsonl, slices, or pre-existing eval files. No headless/-p spawns; Task subagents only. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T3-06-distill-knowledge-capture.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: backlog/wargames/proof/T3-06/worklist.json parses and every non-skipped eval_exists:false entry now has a file in research/evaluations/ (~92 new files, __-form names, additions only — git shows zero modifications to pre-existing eval files). grep -l 'Winner verification (wg-t3-06' research/distillations/knowledge-capture-*.md returns exactly 7 files, each still carrying its original frontmatter with status: draft and an unchanged winner_mechanism line (7 total across the set). Both research/distillations/INDEX.md and research/INDEX.md mention wg-t3-06 as appended status notes. backlog/wargames/proof/T3-06/next-tickets/ holds >=3 parseable ticket JSONs and engine/store/queue/ contains NO t3-06a/b/c tickets (proposals not self-queued). backlog/wargames/proof/T3-06/REPORT.md exists with the premise-correction finding. A commit mentioning wg-t3-06 exists. Negative: research/artifacts.jsonl, research/artifacts/, research/recon/, research/distillations-archive-2026-05-26/, upstream repos under ~/dev/upstream/, and ~/dev/ad/appydave-plugins/ all show no changes.
